_comment: Cross-Tracer Origin E2E — Fixture A' frontend. Minimal Vite manifest so `regenerate.sh` can run `npx vite build` against ./index.html + ./app.js without a global package install. The Rust→WASM module is built separately by `wasm-pack` and dropped into ./pkg/ before Vite resolves the `./pkg/balance_calc.js` import.
name: account-balance-with-wasm-frontend
